item.title: Reports
item.description: DTEX publishes comprehensive insider risk management reports, from the cost of insider threats to nation-state operations and more.

item.title: Potential Risk Indicator Decay and Insider Risk Management
item.description: Understanding Potential Risk Indicators and their value in the context of time is critical to managing insider risks effectively.

item.title: Proactive Insider Risk Management | A Case for Technology Consolidation
item.description: Consolidating DLP, UAM and UEBA under insider risk management affords the opportunity to be proactive, instead of reactive.

item.title: Protecting Critical Infrastructure from Insider Threats: A Case Study on Rail Networks
item.description: Understand why protecting critical infrastructure from insider threats is so important, and how to get started.

item.title: Redefining Cybersecurity with AI Innovation: DTEX and AWS Lead the Way
item.description: DTEX is making strategic investments in AI innovation, with Ai3 and a deep collaboration with AWS's Generative AI Innovation Center.

item.title: Rethinking Cyber Talent: Building Teams for Insider Risk Success
item.description: Discover the cyber talent needed to build highly effective insider risk management teams to enhance proactive breach prevention.

item.title: Striking the Right Balance in Security Consolidation
item.description: Discover why insider risk management is prime for security consolidation, enhancing insider threat detection while boosting business resilience.

item.title: Shadow AI and the GenAI Divide: Why DTEX is the Control Plane for AI Adoption
item.description: DTEX sees the GenAI Divide as an opportunity to rethink how organizations govern AI usage. Read the blog to see why.

item.title: Standardizing Data: How OCSF Supports Proactive Insider Risk Management
item.description: DTEX is proud to be a founding member of the Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework (OCSF), an open-source project established to remove security data silos.

item.title: Strengthening Healthcare Security Through Insider Risk Management
item.description: Protecting healthcare data means safeguarding lives. Learn how proactive insider risk management strengthens security and resilience in this interconnected industry.

item.title: From Awareness to Action: Strengthening Insider Risk Programs in Federal
item.description: Explore strategies to strengthen federal insider risk programs, enhance unclassified network monitoring, and adopt analytics-led approaches for national security.

item.title: The Future Workforce is One of Empathy
item.description: Organizations wanting to ensure the success of their employees should consider ways to drive trust and respect, not surveillance.

item.title: The Proactive Power of Tabletop Exercises in Insider Risk Management
item.description: Tabletop exercises allow the insider risk management team to keep their head when all about them are losing theirs.

item.title: The Importance of Trust in Your Insider Risk Program
item.description: Employees who feel trusted are fully invested and will go to great lengths not to put their employer at risk.

item.title: The Rise of AI and Blended Attacks: Key Takeaways from RSAC 2024
item.description: RSAC 2024 can be summed up in two letters: AI. The pressure is building on organizations to uplift AI security and insider risk management.

item.title: iTA Workshop: What Happens When a Trusted Contractor Turns into a Server-Side Threat?
item.description: Explore the risks associated with servers. Join our workshop to learn how trusted contractors can become server-side threats in unexpected ways.

item.title: Meet Marshall Heilman: New CEO for DTEX
item.description: Meet Marshall Heilman: DTEX CEO and man on a mission to deliver the best insider risk protection in the world.

item.title: DTEX Taps Intelligence Expert Michael Barnhart to Counter Nation State Insider Threats
item.description: DTEX taps Michael Barnhart to supercharge insider threat intelligence to combat cyber espionage from nation state actors, including DPRK.

item.title: Mitigating Insider Risks Amid Election Misinformation and Divisiveness in the Workplace
item.description: Insider risk management teams must monitor global disinformation impacts on election security, preparing for increased risks from political divisiveness.

item.title: MITRE and DTEX Announce Public-Private Partnership to Elevate Insider Risk Programs & Advance Human-centric Security
item.description: DTEX has partnered with Mitre Corporation to enhance insider risk prevention strategies with behavioral data and research. Learn more.

item.title: Modern Data Exfiltration Patterns: What Security Teams Must Detect Early
item.description: Data loss increasingly looks like normal behavior. Learn the modern data exfiltration patterns and how to detect risk early.

item.title: IT Superiority: Modernizing Federal Systems to Mitigate Insider Threats
item.description: DTEX helps federal agencies focus on consolidation and AI to drive efficiency and resilience in insider risk management.

item.title: When AI Distorts Truth, Insider Risk Escalates
item.description: Discover how to confront synthetic certainty, govern AI risk, and operationalize truth as a security discipline in the age of GenAI.

item.title: National Insider Threat Awareness Month: Proactive Security Starts Inside
item.description: Insider Threat Awareness Month is a call to act: detect behaviors early, govern AI use, and build resilience against modern insider risks.

item.title: Next Up for GenAI Security
item.description: Learn how DTEX InTERCEPT provides deep visibility into GenAI tool use, monitors AI risks like DeepSeek & notetakers, and prevents data leaks across all platforms.

item.title: NIST-aligned AI Governance: What it Really Means for Your Organization
item.description: DTEX NIST-aligned AI governance is leading the way in how to embrace AI and innovation without compromising security, compliance, or trust.

item.title: DTEX Patent Validates the Future of Risk-Adaptive DLP
item.description: DTEX secures a patent redefining data loss prevention with risk-adaptive protection — proving trusted, defensible innovation for long-term data security.

item.title: Pentagon Compromise | The Most Effective Insider Threat Sensors Are People
item.description: DTEX i3 team confirms people are the most effective insider threat sensors; identifies several other early warning indicators.

item.title: People: The Nuclei of Your Insider Risk Management Solution
item.description: People--colleagues, partners, vendors, and customers--are the most important ingredient in every insider risk management (IRM) solution.

item.title: Insider Knowledge Theft: What Your Board Needs to Know
item.description: Insider threats are rising fast. Explore how knowledge theft is reshaping cybersecurity - and why insider risk demands urgent executive attention.
